changes.summary: Tracks the current room floor separately from the viewed map floor and hides the current-room marker on non-current floors.
Retuned all 27 Stage 1 room marker positions to a more readable per-floor layout.
Added PlayMode coverage for current-room marker visibility when switching floor tabs.
Reseeded Stage1 map runtime so serialized marker positions match the tuned seeder data.

findings.details: Parsed 27 marker positions from Stage1MapRuntimeSeeder. All markers are within the conservative map-image bounds of x +/-300 and y +/-180.
Executed 'Escape From Nightmares/Seed Stage1 Map Runtime'. Unity log reported 'Seeded Stage1 map runtime.'
No C# compile errors were reported after the final compile. Console included MCP lifecycle entries and normal test-result output.
Unity MCP EditMode test job b38b85d3a96e492b89f68c703d88564f passed 6/6 tests.
Unity MCP PlayMode test job 27db80ac56f941e383f2ebcf7cc6e371 passed 8/8 tests.
